name: 05-05-discover-radar-density
title: Discover radar card density and empty avatar cleanup
description: Reduce crowding in the discover radar result cards and prevent empty/broken NPC avatar images from showing as blank image icons.
creator: lijin
notes: Reduced discover radar density, added avatar image fallback, converted preview tiles to background art fallback, and verified with tests/typecheck/build/Playwright. 2026-05-09 follow-up: capped desktop discover board height and moved long radar/card results into dedicated internal scroll containers so the right column no longer stretches the whole page; verified with updated discover static regression plus Playwright desktop/mobile report at .trellis/tasks/05-05-05-05-discover-radar-density/artifacts/playwright-board-height/report.md.
